topic.what: adversarial robustness of near-field mmWave imaging under waveform-domain physical attacks
topic.how: differential imaging attack framework optimizing injected waveforms via gradient-based methods to manipulate image reconstruction
topic.why_matters: safety-critical applications like airport screening where attacks can conceal weapons or inject false targets, exposing critical security vulnerabilities

characteristics.what_it_measures: similarity between adversarial and target/clean images for classical algorithms
characteristics.vs_baseline: attacks produce images highly similar to target (SSIMAT=0.85) while dissimilar to clean (SSIMAC=0.13)
characteristics.evidence: Table I summary across 5 classical algorithms
characteristics.context: unconstrained attack power; target conceal and swap attacks combined average

characteristics.what_it_measures: similarity between adversarial and target/clean images for learning-based algorithms
characteristics.vs_baseline: attacks less effective on learning-based methods; higher PSNRAC (more similar to clean), lower SSIMAT (less similar to target)
characteristics.evidence: Table I summary across 5 learning-based algorithms
characteristics.context: unconstrained attack power; demonstrates higher robustness of deep learning methods

characteristics.what_itasures: transmitted attack power relative to sensing signal power
characteristics.vs_baseline: attacks require only moderate power; classical algorithms need 4-20x less power than learning-based
characteristics.evidence: Table I Pa/Ps ratios for conceal and swap attacks
characteristics.context: attack power constraint λ||w||² in optimization (17)

characteristics.what_it_measures: peak signal-to-noise ratio of adversarial vs target image for conceal attack
characteristics.vs_baseline: high PSNR indicates adversarial image closely matches target (blank image)
characteristics.context: unconstrained power; blank image as target

characteristics.value: Classical: 17.65-22.11dB vs target, Learning: 9.75-18.20dB vs target
characteristics.vs_baseline: classical algorithms remain highly vulnerable; learning-based exhibit partial robustness
characteristics.context: attack power limited to 10dB below sensing signal

characteristics.what_itasures: PSNR for target swap attack replacing true target with fake
characteristics.value: Classical PSNRAT 54.95dB, SSIMAT 0.95; Learning PSNRAT 30.83dB, SSIMAT 0.83
characteristics.vs_baseline: attacks successfully replace true target with adversarial target
characteristics.context: randomly selected image from dataset as target

characteristics.vs_baseline: first real-measured dataset of clean and attack waveforms for mmWave imaging
characteristics.context: 10+ distinct targets using TI IWR1843Boost radar testbed
